title: EB-5 Investors: May Visa Bulletin Advances EB-5 Dates for Chinese Investors, Cautions Retrogression for India | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## EB-5 Investors: May Visa Bulletin Advances EB-5 Dates for Chinese Investors, Cautions Retrogression for India

The May Visa Bulletin sets EB-5 visa availability for investors seeking US permanent residency through investment in a job-creating enterprise. Senior Counsel Mitch Wexler says in EB-5 Investors that China’s EB-5 Unreserved category advances by three weeks to September 22, 2026, opening additional processing opportunities, while India’s dates remain unchanged with the Department of State noting potential for retrogression amid sustained demand.
